title: Job workload vs power budget
query_text: Does the current job workload fit within the facility power budget for this cluster?

eval_criteria.gold_answer: At peak (10:00 UTC) the cluster draws 442 kWh with three large jobs running simultaneously. The facility_context.md states a cluster power cap of 500 kW. Current draw is within budget (~88% of cap) but leaves only ~58 kW headroom. If additional large jobs start, the cap may be breached. Facility admin should monitor and potentially throttle new submissions.
